description: The Execution of Imam Khomeini's Order (Setad-e Ejrayi-ye Farman-e Hazrat-e Emam, commonly known as Setad) is a massive Iranian economic conglomerate established by decree of [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) in 1989. It manages confiscated and unclaimed properties and operates across real estate, petrochemicals, telecommunications, and finance. Estimated to control assets worth tens of billions of dollars. Headed by [Parviz Fattah](/people/parviz-fattah) since 2023. Sanctioned by the US and EU.
editorial_notes: Known as Setad. One of the largest economic entities in Iran, directly controlled by the Supreme Leader's office.
